seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: composite: instantiate weighted Max-SAT as a fish-ladder gate-regime problem (gates=Boolean vars, salmon runs=weighted clauses, passage conditions=literals) with a sign/weight-biased generator so the all-low-flow baseline is genuinely weak while neither all-low nor all-high is optimal; score = satisfied weight / all-low-flow baseline weight.
title: Salmon Migration Ladder: Gate-Regime Weighting
strategies: all-low-flow baseline: every gate set to 0 (matches the checker baseline, ratio ~0.1)
independent per-gate weighted vote: set each gate to the sign carrying more incident run weight (ignores interactions)
steepest-ascent hill climbing: repeatedly flip the gate that most increases total passable weight until no improving flip remains
randomized multi-restart local search: hill-climb from the vote seed and from several seeded random regimes, keep the best assignment found
